title: Random Events
description: Random events occur periodically to keep the players challenged.
body:
# RandomEvents

## New Features

* **Admin Menu Control Panel:** Introduced the main command `/re menu`, allowing admins to open an in-game configuration editor for quick and intuitive management.
* **New Events:** Added a collection of unique, custom events never seen before in previous versions.
* **bStats Integration:** Implemented anonymous usage tracking to monitor plugin adoption and the popularity of specific events.

## Admin Menu Control Panel

* **Event Control:** Instantly enable or disable any event directly through the menu for easier server management.

## New Events Added

* **Floating Islands:** Spawns sky islands filled with loot (W.I.P).
* **Item Rain:** Causes valuable items to fall from the sky.
* **Airstrike:** Triggers a dangerous bombing run.
* **Giant Boss:** Summons an epic boss battle.
* **Mob Mutation:** Makes mobs significantly stronger.
* **Gravity Flip:** Reverses gravity for all players.
* **Super Jump:** Grants an extreme jump boost.
* **Player Swap:** Randomly swaps players’ positions.

## Placeholders
These placeholders are now supported:

* `%randomevents_active_events%` — List of currently active events.
* `%randomevents_event_count%` — Number of active events.
* `%randomevents_total_events_triggered%` — Total number of events triggered.
* `%randomevents_count_floating_islands%` — Shows how many times the Floating Islands event has been triggered.
